sources.name: Clark County GIS (parcels / owner / address)
sources.note: server live; parcel layer not yet pinned -- run `python -m grit discover` then set CLARK_PARCEL_LAYER

sources.name: Clark County Assessor (parcel / owner / sales)
sources.note: LIVE per-APN enrichment (0.102): current owner, address, value, last sale, characteristics via parceldetail.aspx GET. Deterministic parser.

sources.name: City of Las Vegas permits (ArcGIS Hub — LIVE permit flow)
sources.note: ★ LIVE PERMIT FLOW. CLV building permits via ArcGIS Hub Feature Service (portal moved off Socrata). Cloud-native ArcGIS REST -- same transport as parcels, no residential IP. Set CLV_PERMITS_FEATURESERVER, then pulled every harvest -> PERMIT events -> IMMEDIATE scoring.

sources.name: Nevada SOS business entities (SilverFlume / ORION)
sources.note: LLC_REGISTRATION + officer/registered-agent graph. Official BULK DOWNLOAD + API exist (sanctioned -- no scraping). Powers entity graph.

sources.name: Nevada State Contractors Board (license search)
sources.note: Every licensed contractor by trade = buyer list + permit-puller verification + license-status events. Bulk via public-records request.

sources.name: Clark County permits (Accela Citizen Access)
sources.note: ★ Highest-value signal. PERMIT events (who/where/value/date) + Code Cases. ViewState portal; 403s the runner -- residential capture. [no bot access from here -- residential capture]

sources.name: Clark County Recorder (deeds / NOD / liens)
sources.note: ★ Distress engine. Search by Document Type + Record Date: DEED, Notice of Default, Trustee's Sale, Lis Pendens, mechanics/tax liens. Signals only -- never resell document copies (NV AG alert).

sources.name: City of Las Vegas permits
sources.note: Incorporated-city permits (separate from county). Same parser as county.

sources.name: City of Henderson permits
sources.note: Incorporated-city permits (separate from county). [server up; bot-blocked HTTP 403 -- harvest needs browser/residential IP]

sources.name: City of North Las Vegas permits
sources.note: Incorporated-city permits (separate from county). [server up; bot-blocked HTTP 403 -- harvest needs browser/residential IP]

sources.name: Clark County courts (eviction / probate)
sources.note: Eviction filings (Justice Court) + probate (District Court). NEEDS VALIDATION + compliance read (FCRA line, NRS 645F outreach rules).
